title: RealScale
description: Make your players simulate their real size on your server!
body:
![real scale logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e2bc921aaea09d2c03e1952d43349092faa0eef.png)

## Make your players simulate their real size on your server!
ONLY WORKS IN **1.21**

> Commands
**/scale <scale in centimeters>** _Permission: scale.scale_
**/scalereload** _Permission: scale.reload_

> Configuration

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

```yml
Messages:
  no-params: "&bInvalid arguments"
  invalid-measure: "&bInvalid measure"
  scale-change: "&fTransforming &b%measure%cm &fto new scale for &b%player%&f: &b%scale%"
  exceeded-measure: "&bThat measurement is below the maximum or minimum"
  no-permission: "&cYou dont have permissions"

Config:
  maximum-measure: 210
  minimum-measure: 135
```


</details>

![real scale nerd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73e5ab28b5739000064a22be267b9a88375ac6e4.png)
